meta-description: Learn about in-network copayments by reviewing the definition in the HealthCare.gov Glossary.
title: In-network copayment
excerpt: A fixed amount (for example, $15) you pay for covered health care services to providers who contract with your health insurance or plan. In-network copayments usually are less than out-of-network copayments.
content: A fixed amount (for example, $15) you pay for covered health care services to providers who contract with your health insurance or plan. In-network copayments usually are less than out-of-network copayments.
